articles.title: England handed reality check by Ghana but remain in strong position after 0-0 draw
articles.description: England's drab goalless draw with Ghana is no cause to panic - but it does serve as a reality check, writes Phil McNulty.

articles.title: Watch: Football fans celebrate in Ghana after draw with England
articles.description: Ghana correspondent Thomas Naadi reports from Black Star Square in Accra.

articles.title: Hundreds of schools plan closures ahead of red heat alerts
articles.description: The temperature topped 34.6 C in Wisley, England, on Tuesday while Scotland and Northern Ireland saw their hottest days of the year.

articles.title: The UK's summers are getting hotter - but how prepared are we?
articles.description: Based on current trends parts of the UK are set to see 40C summers regularly within a couple of decades.
